title: nephrodium crenatum
intro: Nephrodium crenatum, also known as the crenated nephrodium, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Nephrodium crenatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also applied topically as a poultice or ointment to treat various health conditions.
